# Micro25 Tool25 Swarm50 Contract

## Micro 25
micro compaction usage pressure defaults to 0.25 so tool-result clearing starts earlier

## Tool 25
model-facing tool result budgets default to 25 chars with 2-char previews

## Swarm 50
swarm expert body / total / inline densify to 50 / 1.5k / 10 and handoff ceiling 0.025 for thriftier multi-agent handoffs

## Evidence path
